type.description:
The type of the payment transaction. This field represents the purpose of the payment and can be one of several pre-defined choices.

* `e_commerce` - E-Commerce
* `payment_request` - Payment request
* `bulk` - Bulk Payment Request
* `catalogue` - Catalogue purchase
* `customer_payment` - Customer payment
* `event` - Event management and booking
* `food_ordering` - Food ordering
* `iata` - IATA
* `real_estate` - Real Estate

amount.description: The refunded amount for this transaction.

currency_code.description: The currency code of the refunded amount (e.g., KWD, USD).

created.description: Date and time when the refund was initiated.

modified.description: Date and time when the refund was modified.

state.description: Current state of the refund transaction (e.g., refunded, refund_queued, refund_rejected).

gateway_code.description: The payment gateway code used to process the refund.

track_id.description: Gateway tracking ID returned from the payment gateway.

auth_code.description: Authorization code returned from the payment gateway.

product_type.description: Type of the original transaction (e.g., Payment Request, E-Commerce, Customer Payment, Bulk).

reference_number.description: Reference number of this refund transaction.

order_no.description: Order number of the original parent transaction.

parent_session_id.description: Session ID of the original parent transaction.

session_id.description: Session ID of this refund transaction.

initiator.description: User who initiated the refund operation.
